title: EtherImagen
description:
adds a simple and immersive way to display your own pictures inside Minecraft.

body:
Description
EtherImagen adds a simple and immersive way to display your own pictures inside Minecraft.

Using special image frames, you can upload images stored on your PC and place them directly in your world as decoration, posters, artwork, signs, memes, event banners, and more.

 

🖼 Features:
- Upload custom images from your computer
- Place images in decorative frames
- Easy to use in survival or creative worlds
- Multiplayer support
- Lightweight and optimized
🔒 Permissions System:
The mod includes a command to control who can interact with image frames.

Command:
 /etherimage requireop <true/false>

- true  → Only OP players can use image frames
- false → All players can use image frames

Examples:
- /etherimage requireop true
- /etherimage requireop false

Support for URL requires watermedia will be added soon
